tasks.label: Run Tests (GCC)
tasks.command: cmake --build build-gcc --parallel --config Release --target libcpprime_tests; ctest --test-dir build-gcc -C Release

tasks.label: Run Tests (Clang)
tasks.command: cmake --build build-clang --parallel --config Release --target libcpprime_tests; ctest --test-dir build-clang -C Release

tasks.label: Run Tests (MSVC)
tasks.command: cmake --build build-msvc --parallel --config Release --target libcpprime_tests; ctest --test-dir build-msvc -C Release

tasks.label: Benchmark (GCC)
tasks.command: cmake --build build-gcc --parallel --config Release --target benchmark_isprime; ./build-gcc/benchmark_isprime; uv run benchmarks/plot_isprime.py

tasks.label: Benchmark (Clang)
tasks.command: cmake --build build-clang --parallel --config Release --target benchmark_isprime; ./build-clang/benchmark_isprime; uv run benchmarks/plot_isprime.py

tasks.label: Benchmark (MSVC)
tasks.command: cmake --build build-msvc --parallel --config Release --target benchmark_isprime; ./build-msvc/Release/benchmark_isprime.exe; uv run benchmarks/plot_isprime.py
